name: Strawberries 'n Cream Angel Hearts
recipeInstructions:
1. Fold the mashed strawberries into the whipped topping.
2. Cut the angel food cake slices into 4 hearts.
3. Spread about one tablespoon of the whipped topping mixture on one side of each of two hearts.
4. Place the topping-side up on serving plates.
5. Top with sliced strawberries.
6. Spread the remaining topping on both sides of the remaining hearts.
7. Place these on top of the strawberries.
8. Drizzle with chocolate syrup.
